name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for the porting workflow
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- A concrete situation where the current workflow falls short. Describe
     the user experience: what you were trying to port, what the agent
     did, why the result was unsatisfying. -->

## Proposed change

<!-- What would you add or change? Be specific — name skills, files,
     templates. -->

## Why this belongs in core

<!-- `code-distilling` core is the general porting workflow. Domain-
     specific or third-party integrations belong in separate plugins. Why
     does this benefit users porting from completely different references
     than yours? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else could solve this problem? Why are those worse? -->

## Are you willing to send a PR?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No, but I can help test
- [ ] No
